description: Perform a mediation analysis to test if revision time ('Revise') mediates the relationship between exam anxiety ('Anxiety') and exam performance ('Exam'). Save the JASP project to '~/Documents/JASP/MediationAnalysis.jasp'. Create a text report at '~/Documents/JASP/mediation_report.txt' including the coefficients for Path a (Anxiety -> Revise), Path b (Revise -> Exam), the Indirect Effect estimate, the Direct Effect estimate, and a conclusion stating whether the results represent 'Full Mediation', 'Partial Mediation', or 'No Mediation'.
